type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Less waste rock was disposed of in 2012 in comparison to 2011, however, graphitic meta-pelite below the ore zone was disposed of, which contains higher concentrations of arsenic. Limited waste rock was generated prior to 2011 due to the mine inflows which occured in 2006 and 2008. Waste rock at the Cigar Lake Operation is stored on lined pads designed to contain water. The waste rock management facilities are monitored on a regular basis to ensure effective containment and are subject to federal and provincial requirements.
